component.name: AbelNotes
component.summary: Handwritten notes with LaTeX, PDF annotation and self-hosted sync

description.p: AbelNotes is a handwriting-first note-taking app for pen and touch. Write, draw and annotate, then keep everything on a server you control.

ul.li: Natural pen input with pressure and tilt; palm rejection for stylus users.
Import and annotate PDFs, with text selection and search.
LaTeX math elements (paste $$…$$ or \[…\]) and geometric shape recognition.
Sync notebooks to your own Nextcloud or any generic WebDAV server — no cloud lock-in.
Import from OneNote, Obsidian and Notion exports.

description.p: Free and open source (AGPL-3.0). No accounts, no ads, no tracking — your notes stay on your hardware.

screenshot.caption: Handwriting and math on grid paper
Your notebook library, synced over WebDAV

description.p: Linux stylus fix: pens that GDK mislabels as a mouse (some Wayland/Xwayland digitizers and driverless tablets) now draw instead of only hovering.
